problem: AI agents execute paid work — trades, payments, decisions — but leave no verifiable proof. When disputes arise, there's nothing to audit.
why_now: Pay-per-result AI agents (x402, agent-to-agent payments) are going live in 2026. Every paid agent action needs a receipt.
product_sentence: AgentLedger: if an agent gets paid, it leaves a receipt. Tamper-proof decision hashes on Casper.
demo_aha: A treasury agent approves a vendor payment on-chain. Then we edit the decision text — verification fails. The ledger never lies.
target_user: Agent platform operators and DAOs deploying autonomous agents for paid work. They need settlement-grade proof of what each agent did.
proof: Working Odra DecisionRegistry on Casper testnet. Real record_decision transactions with job_payment_ref_hash. Tamper-detection verifier in the UI.
one_sentence: If an agent gets paid, it leaves a receipt — tamper-proof, on Casper, verifiable by anyone.
